final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial travel photography, landscape composition
Primary request: aerial and ground-level combined view of Jiangnan water town during rapeseed flower season, showcasing golden flower fields meeting traditional village architecture
Scene/backdrop: ancient village in Zhejiang, China, rolling hills with terraced tea plantations on distant slopes, clear blue sky with scattered white clouds
Subject: endless golden rapeseed flower fields stretching to horizon, traditional white-wall black-tile houses scattered among flowers, ancient stone arch bridge crossing clear river, weeping willows with tender green branches swaying in wind, several villagers in traditional clothing working in fields
Style/medium: drone aerial photography combined with telephoto ground shots, photorealistic landscape
Composition/framing: wide panoramic view from elevated angle transitioning to ground level details, 24-70mm and telephoto lens perspectives
Lighting/mood: natural morning light at 10 AM, soft and poetic atmosphere with gentle shadows, moderate color saturation
Color palette: dominant golden yellow (rapeseed), deep blue sky, crisp white walls, black roof tiles, tender green willows and tea terraces
Materials/textures: blooming rapeseed petals, traditional tile roof textures, weathered stone bridge surface, flowing river water, soft willow branches
Constraints: preserve the poetic contrast between golden fields and green tea terraces, maintain authentic Jiangnan water town character
Avoid: oversaturated colors, artificial HDR effects, modern buildings, plastic-looking flowers, watermark
